requirement_topic.en: IoT Cybersecurity — CyberSecurity Malaysia Advisory (Regulatory Gap)
requirement_topic.zh: 物联网网络安全——CyberSecurity Malaysia咨询（监管空白）
requirement_topic.zht: 物聯網網路安全——CyberSecurity Malaysia諮詢（監管空白）

summary.en: CyberSecurity Malaysia (an agency under the Ministry of Digital) provides cybersecurity evaluation services including Common Criteria (CC) evaluation and the MySEF (Malaysia Security Evaluation Facility) scheme. However, as of mid-2026, there is no mandatory IoT device cybersecurity certification requirement in Malaysia for consumer wireless or IoT devices. MCMC has signalled it is developing cybersecurity regulations for radio terminal equipment under the CMA 1998 framework, but no enforceable instrument has been gazetted. Compliance with MCMC type approval requirements does not currently include a cybersecurity test standard.
summary.zh: CyberSecurity Malaysia（数字部下属机构）提供网络安全评估服务，包括CC（通用准则）评估和MySEF（马来西亚安全评估设施）计划。然而，截至2026年中，马来西亚对消费类无线或物联网设备尚无强制性物联网网络安全认证要求。MCMC已表示正在依据CMA 1998框架制定无线终端设备网络安全法规，但目前尚无可执行法规刊宪。MCMC型式认可合规要求目前不包含网络安全检测标准。
summary.zht: CyberSecurity Malaysia（數位部下屬機構）提供網路安全評估服務，包括CC（通用準則）評估和MySEF（馬來西亞安全評估設施）計劃。然而，截至2026年中，馬來西亞對消費類無線或物聯網裝置尚無強制性物聯網網路安全認證要求。MCMC已表示正在依據CMA 1998框架制定無線終端設備網路安全法規，但目前尚無可執行法規刊憲。MCMC型式認可合規要求目前不包含網路安全測試標準。

standards_or_laws: CyberSecurity Malaysia — MySEF Cybersecurity Evaluation Scheme (advisory)
Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Act 709), Malaysia — data handling obligations
MCMC — planned IoT cybersecurity regulations under CMA 1998 (not yet gazetted as of 2026-06)
MS ISO/IEC 27001 — Information Security Management Systems (voluntary)

summary.en: China has no mandatory IoT cybersecurity certification for most consumer wireless devices as of mid-2026. MIIT and the Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) have issued draft IoT and network security standards and the CAC has a cybersecurity review mechanism for critical infrastructure, but mandatory product-level IoT cybersecurity certification for general consumer electronics has not been promulgated. SRRC and NAL processes do not include cybersecurity test criteria.
summary.zh: 截至2026年中，中国对大多数消费类无线设备尚无强制性物联网网络安全认证。工信部和国家互联网信息办公室（网信办）已发布物联网和网络安全标准草案，网信办对关键基础设施设有网络安全审查机制，但针对一般消费电子产品的强制性产品级物联网网络安全认证尚未颁布。SRRC和NAL流程不包含网络安全检测标准。
summary.zht: 截至2026年中，中國對大多數消費類無線裝置尚無強制性物聯網網路安全認證。工信部和國家互聯網信息辦公室（網信辦）已發布物聯網和網路安全標準草案，網信辦對關鍵基礎設施設有網路安全審查機制，但針對一般消費電子產品的強制性產品級物聯網網路安全認證尚未頒布。SRRC和NAL流程不包含網路安全測試標準。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China 2017 (CAC)
GB/T 36951-2018 — Information Security Technology: IoT Security Reference Model (informative)
MIIT draft IoT security technical standards (not yet mandatory for general consumer products as of 2026-06)

gap.en: Advisory gap only as of mid-2026: neither Malaysia nor China has mandatory IoT cybersecurity product certification for general consumer wireless devices. The gap is symmetrical but monitoring is recommended, as MCMC has publicly stated it is developing enforceable IoT cybersecurity regulations. Exporters should track MCMC gazette notices and MCMC type approval guideline updates for any cybersecurity test criteria that may become mandatory.
gap.zh: 截至2026年中仅为咨询性差距：马来西亚和中国均未对一般消费类无线设备实施强制性物联网网络安全产品认证。差距对等，但建议持续关注，因MCMC已公开表示正在制定可执行的物联网网络安全法规。出口商应关注MCMC宪报通知及MCMC型式认可指引更新，以了解可能成为强制性要求的网络安全检测标准。
gap.zht: 截至2026年中僅為諮詢性差距：馬來西亞和中國均未對一般消費類無線裝置實施強制性物聯網網路安全產品認證。差距對等，但建議持續關注，因MCMC已公開表示正在制定可執行的物聯網網路安全法規。出口商應關注MCMC憲報通知及MCMC型式認可指引更新，以了解可能成為強制性要求的網路安全測試標準。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No mandatory IoT cybersecurity certification exists in Malaysia for consumer wireless devices as of mid-2026. CyberSecurity Malaysia MySEF evaluation is voluntary. Monitor MCMC gazette notices for any forthcoming enforceable cybersecurity requirements under the CMA 1998 framework.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年中，马来西亚对消费类无线设备尚无强制性物联网网络安全认证。CyberSecurity Malaysia MySEF评估为自愿性质。请关注MCMC宪报通知，以了解1998年《通讯及多媒体法令》框架下任何即将实施的强制性网络安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年中，馬來西亞對消費類無線裝置尚無強制性物聯網網路安全認證。CyberSecurity Malaysia MySEF評估為自願性質。請關注MCMC憲報通知，以了解1998年《通訊及多媒體法令》框架下任何即將實施的強制性網路安全要求。
